Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.comstock_building_type" AS comstock_building_type, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, min(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" * 1) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh__min" 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs 
WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state = 'CO' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/fd02a4b7451f2fcc517cd0121e52af8d0370ae9fdde513b52abbf5bec9ec998f/27d6f4b8-359e-4627-9e2f-9ac5de0d1d58/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
